name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<forks, states>>

(* Invariant: No two philosophers eat with the same fork *)
NoTwoEatSameFork == \A i, j \in 1..N :
                     /\ i # j
                     /\ IsEating(i)
                     /\ IsEating(j)
                     /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
                     /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
                     /\ forks[LEFT(j)] = j
                     /\ forks[RIGHT(j)] = j
                     /\ (LEFT(i) = LEFT(j) \/ LEFT(i) = RIGHT(j) \/ RIGHT(i) = LEFT(j) \/ RIGHT(i) = RIGHT(j))
                     => FALSE

(* Invariant: Forks are either free or held by a philosopher *)
ForksCorrect == \A i \in 1..N :
                 forks[i] = "free" \/ forks[i] \in 1..N

(* Invariant: Philosopher states are valid *)
StatesCorrect == \A i \in 1..N :
                   states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Type correctness invariant *)
TypeOK == ForksCorrect /\ StatesCorrect

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ size \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
           /\ size' = size + 1

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ size' = size - 1

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ r \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
       \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ r \notin readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
       \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ r \in readers'
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_CHUNKS
VARIABLES receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, fileChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = FILE_CHUNKS
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ receivedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, fileChunks[retransmitCount + 1])
    /\ retransmitCount' = IF retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES THEN retransmitCount + 1 ELSE retransmitCount
    /\ receivedChunks' = IF retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES THEN receivedChunks ELSE receivedChunks

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLE free, allocated, p

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \notin DOMAIN allocated
          /\ \E p \in free:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in free: p']
              /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in DOMAIN allocated:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in allocated[c]: p']
              /\ free' = free \cup {p}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in DOMAIN allocated: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
